findings: Banned model list is consistent across schema, prose policy, and capsule blocks (agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:106-111, 162-164, 203-207).
Enforcement is reactive: policy says mark bundle partial after fallback, but no pre-launch validation or retry/abort guidance (agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:168-169).
Depth-guard lint has no checks for banned-model lists, overlaps, or consistency across sections, allowing drift (tests/depth-guard-lint.sh:17-61).
